messages.message: Hey J$ — been reading for years and your net worth tracking page is epic. I built a free interactive net worth projector that visualizes compound growth trajectories over time — feels like a natural companion to your spreadsheet for readers who want a quick visual check between monthly updates. Happy to send the link if you're curious!

I noticed your financial wellness page offers calculators for debt management and budgeting. I have a free interactive debt snowball widget that visualizes payoff strategies for each client — would be a great addition for your DMP participants. No signup needed — want me to send the embed code?

Your calculator page covers a lot of ground — I built a free interactive debt snowball widget that makes the payoff journey visual, which might resonate better than a static form for your audience. No signup, mobile-friendly. Interested in the embed code?

Your family finances resource page is a valuable community tool. I have two free interactive calculators for retirement planning and investment returns — mobile-friendly, no signup — that might complement your existing tools. Interested?

next_step: Complete pre-send checks on all 4 contact paths, then Auditor re-approves before sending
